verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All along on the road to the soul's true abode, There's an Eye watching you; Every step that you take, this Great Eye is awake, There's an Eye watching you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Watching you, watching you, Everyday mind the course you pursue; Watching you, watching you, There's an all-seeing Eye watching you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As you make life's great flight, keep the path way of right, There's an Eye watching you; God will warn not to go in the path of the foe, There's an Eye watching you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fix your mind on the goal, that sweet home of the soul, There's an Eye watching you; Never turn from the way to the kingdom of day, There's an Eye watching you.
